title: Yao Changdong
content:
Yao Changdong
 is a member of the 
Yao Family
 of the 
Allheaven Star System
. He was the first one to arrive to execute 
Wang Lin
 under the Heaven order released by the Yao Family. He received intel of Wang Lin being near Planet Black Earth of the Western Domain.

Yao Changdong is a third-generation member of the Yao Family.

Appearance
[
]

Yao Changdong is usually dressed in a pristine white robe.

↑

Chapter 826
